results.title: TSANG HO MING V. COMMISSIONER OF POLICE AND ANOTHER
results.coram: Before: Hon Coleman J in Chambers (Open to Public)
results.parties: BETWEEN TSANG HO MING Applicant and COMMISSIONER OF POLICE 1st Putative Respondent SECRETARY FOR JUSTICE 2nd Putative Respondent
